# ITECS AI — LLMs.txt

> ITECS is a Dallas-based managed IT services provider (est. 2002) offering
> enterprise AI consulting, managed intelligence, custom AI agents, AI
> security compliance, and AI-optimized SEO services.

## Company

- Name: Itecs Outsourcing, LLC
- Founded: 2002
- Location: Dallas, TX (serving Dallas-Fort Worth)
- Website: https://itecs.ai
- Main website: https://itecsonline.com
- International phone: (214) 444-7884
- Toll-free phone: (877) 483-2710
- Address: 17304 Preston Rd. Ste 460, Dallas, TX 75252
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=17304%20Preston%20Rd.%20Ste%20460%2C%20Dallas%2C%20TX%2075252
- Specialization: AI Consulting, Managed IT, Cybersecurity, Cloud

## AI Services

### AI Consulting & Strategy
URL: https://itecs.ai/consulting
Vendor-neutral AI readiness assessments, ROI modeling, and governance frameworks.
Industries: Healthcare, Financial Services, Manufacturing, Legal.
Engagement models: Two-week Insight Sprints, 4-6 week POCs, 8-12 week implementations.

### Managed Intelligence Provider
URL: https://itecs.ai/managed-intelligence-provider
A Managed Intelligence Provider is an operating layer for production AI:
governed agents, automations, model selection, monitoring, optimization,
security controls, and executive reporting for organizations with 10-300
employees.

### Custom AI Agents
URL: https://itecs.ai/custom-ai-agents
Custom agents, Claude and Codex workflows, and RAG-powered assistants grounded
in client data. Multi-channel deployment and HIPAA/SOC 2 capable architectures.

### AI Security & Compliance
URL: https://itecs.ai/data-audit
HIPAA, SOX, FINRA, and CMMC-aligned AI security. PHI/PII redaction, audit
logging, Azure OpenAI private networking, and data governance frameworks.

### AI-Optimized SEO & GEO
URL: https://itecs.ai/ai-optimized-seo
Generative Engine Optimization for AI-powered search. Schema.org JSON-LD,
llms.txt and llms-full.txt implementation, AI citation tracking, and
answer-ready content for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.
Tier URLs:
- SEO Foundation: https://itecs.ai/ai-optimized-seo/foundation
- SEO Momentum: https://itecs.ai/ai-optimized-seo/momentum
- SEO Velocity: https://itecs.ai/ai-optimized-seo/velocity

### Internal AI Champion Enablement Program
URL: https://itecs.ai/services/ai-champion-program
4-6 week structured enablement program that trains one trusted employee to
become the organization's internal AI lead. Includes 1:1 strategist coaching,
prompt library development, governance support, train-the-trainer materials,
and 90-day post-program support. Pricing: $8,500-$12,000.

## Technology Partners
Microsoft Azure, Microsoft, Claude, OpenAI, Copilot, Sophos

## Clients
PepsiCo, Pizza Hut, OpenText, Miller, BE Farms
